headline: Executive Director at nettlefold.
summary:
Michael has been engaged across a broad spectrum of OOH advertising activities over the last 40 years.

Some of these include:

Asia Pacific Sales and Development Director of Metromedia Technologies (MMT). A digital computer painting technology that revolutionised the OOH sector in the late 1980’s.

The establishment of the original Bridge Advertising sign network on the Tullamarine Freeway in Melbourne, Australia.

Development of a number of iconic OOH companies in South East Asia, including: Big Tree Advertising in Malaysia & Humpuss Outdoor Advertising in Indonesia.

Founder and Chief Executive of Eye Corp. Eye Corp led a dynamic phase of OOH company aggregation through:

Acquisition of Claude Neon.

Acquisition of Airport Advertising Australia (external and internal advertising rights to most major airports throughout Australia).

Acquisition of Victorian Railway System Outdoor Advertising rights (PTC).
Successfully tendered for the Sydney Domestic airport external advertising rights.

Eye Corp also established:

Retail shopping precincts as legitimate advertising environments with the creation of Mall Media (Eyeshop).

Eye Shop installed and operated standardised advertising units in most major shopping centres in Australia and New Zealand (Westfield / Gandel / QIC / AMP).

experiences.title: Director
experiences.description:
The Song Room has a vision that all Australian children should have the opportunity music and the arts to enhance their education, personal development and community involvement.

The Song Room is a not for profit organisation that fund sources from government, corporate support, philanthropic and individual donations.

Well recognised as Australia's leading arts education provider TSR has delivered to over 350,000 face to face programs to disadvantaged children since 2005.

TSR in 2014 won the World Innovation Summit for Education Award (WISE) for outstanding contribution to innovation in education.

experiences.title: Non Executive Chair / Co Founder
experiences.description: Vivid is an emerging sport management company. Currently managing an extensive portfolio of current AFL players and coaches.

experiences.title: Founder CEO
experiences.description:
eye corp was an outdoor advertising business with operations throughout Australia, New Zealand, Malaysia, Indonesia and Myanmar. 

Within Australia and New Zealand, eye established Mall media with the installation of over 1,500 advertising units across the Westfield and Gandel shopping centre networks. 

eye entrenched airport advertising as a legitimate/ dynamic advertising medium following the acquisition of Airport Advertising Australia Pty Ltd in 2001 and the successful tender for Sydney Domestic Airport sign rights. 

eye also created a premium national portfolio of road based advertising displays which included the exclusive rights to advertising on the Victorian Public System. 

Following an acquisition of Claude Neon Australian large format plant, eye became the preeminent OOH company in the Aspac region. 

eye Corp was sold to free to air television group 10 Network in 2003.

experiences.title: ASPAC Region Sales Director
experiences.description:
Metromedia Technologies ( MMT ) revolutionised the global outdoor advertising industry with the introduction of computer painting technology. 

Replacing traditional hand painting techniques with advanced computer paint on flexible vinyl, MMT drove a vital industry step change that allowed advertisers to perfectly replicate billboard size, large format images.
